message:
bench(e2e): emit mt-read artifact rows

bd-db300.7.1.2

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "fsqlite-e2e.mt_read_bench_manifest.v1",
+  "bead_id": "bd-db300.7.1.2",
+  "run_id": "read-heavy-20260425T0618Z",
+  "scenario_id": "mt-read-bench",
+  "artifact_dir": "tests/artifacts/perf/read-heavy-20260425T0618Z",
+  "replay_command": "rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch_target_cod10_1777097212 cargo run --profile release-perf -p fsqlite-e2e --bin mt-read-bench -- --rows=10000 --reads-per-thread=10000 --threads=1,2,4,8 --artifact-dir=tests/artifacts/perf/read-heavy-20260425T0618Z --run-id=read-heavy-20260425T0618Z --build-profile=release-perf",
+  "files": [
+    {
+      "path": "results.json",
+      "description": "Aligned read-heavy benchmark rows and counters"
+    },
+    {
+      "path": "summary.md",
+      "description": "Human-readable read-heavy benchmark summary"
+    },
+    {
+      "path": "manifest.json",
+      "description": "Artifact bundle manifest and replay command"
+    }
+  ]
+}
\ No newline at end of file
